drafting_order: Open with the Ch14 theorem: migration is lawful only when version deltas, compat matrices, rollback law, and retro weaving remain jointly replayable.
Draft the Square lens first to state the base entities and invariants needed by `Migration, Versioning, and Pulse Retro Weaving`.
Use the Flower lens second to translate `Migration, Versioning, and Pulse Retro Weaving` into lawful movement, transport, or operator transitions.
Use the Cloud lens third to define truth handling, ambiguity control, and live corridor behavior for `Migration, Versioning, and Pulse Retro Weaving`.
Use the Fractal lens fourth to bind `Migration, Versioning, and Pulse Retro Weaving` to replay, verification, and certificate-bearing return paths.
Integrate strongest external witnesses early: Astrological Tunneling (octave system), EVA TRANSCRIPTION ORIGIONAL, BUDDHIST (ZEN) THE MUSHIN KERNEL.
Use cross-family bridges to connect Ch14 outward: AI DIVINATION <-> DIVINE JUDGMENT - MsDBB1.
Treat the existing manuscript draft as a prose scaffold, but reorder it around the compiled evidence stack and explicit witness obligations.
Close with a promotion ledger that marks which candidate cells are ready for proof tightening versus immediate drafting.
witness_obligations: All current cells have candidate local witnesses; remaining work is promotion, ordering, and proof tightening.
